w:r.w:t: Go-to-Market Strategy, Channel Playbook & 12-Month Revenue Model
The AI Outbound Platform — Claude Included, Zero Setup
Prepared by: Ayush Saha, Founder | May 2026 | Pre-Seed Stage

Flowfiy is a Claude-powered AI outbound sales operating system built for the global B2B market. Agencies, consultants, SaaS founders, and SDR teams use Flowfiy to research leads, qualify prospects, and generate hyper-personalized email copy -- all through a 5-agent AI pipeline orchestrated on their Flowfiy-managed Anthropic API (Managed AI).

Unlike competitors that absorb API costs, Flowfiy's managed AI model achieves ~70-80% gross margin from day one. With infrastructure costs under $50/month and a $49-$249/month pricing ladder, Flowfiy reaches profitability with fewer than 20 paying subscribers.
Month 12: $33,000+ MRR, 450+ paid subscribers -- $400K ARR run-rate
Segment A -- Outbound Agencies & Lead Gen Agencies
Size: 1-20 person agencies running outbound for clients
Pain: High cost of SDR headcount + Clay/Apollo subscriptions per client seat
Job title: Founder, Head of Growth, Agency Owner
Segment B -- Founder-Led Sales (SaaS / Service Startups)
Pain: No sales team yet; founder does outbound manually
Job title: CEO/Founder, Head of Sales
Segment C -- Individual SDRs & RevOps Professionals
Pain: Quota pressure + repetitive manual research and personalization
Job title: SDR, BDR, Account Executive, RevOps Manager

Flowfiy occupies the white space between cheap-but-dumb (Instantly, Smartlead) and powerful-but-expensive (Clay). Positioning: Clay-level intelligence at Apollo-level pricing -- powered by your own Claude key.
Direct founder outreach: 200 personalized cold DMs/week on LinkedIn to agency owners and founders
Free tier as PLG funnel: 50 lifetime generations drives organic sign-up; upgrade triggered at limit
Product Hunt launch: Coordinate upvotes, Ship It post, and demo video on launch day
Reddit seeding: Case studies in r/sales, r/Entrepreneur, r/SaaS, r/LeadGeneration
AppSumo listing: Lifetime deal to generate early adopter reviews and initial MRR
LinkedIn content flywheel: 3 posts/week (founder story, product demos, outbound tips)
YouTube: 2 videos/week -- Outbound with AI series targeting SDR and agency keywords
Affiliate program: 20% recurring commission to power users and agency owners
SEO blog: 4 articles/month targeting clay alternative, ai outbound tool, cold email software
Paid acquisition: Google Ads + LinkedIn Ads targeting agency decision-makers
Agency white-label program: Custom domain + branding; $499/mo add-on
Eat own dog food: Use Flowfiy pipeline to prospect for new Flowfiy customers
V2 features: LinkedIn + WhatsApp outreach drives upsell to Agency tier
PR: TechCrunch, HN Show HN, TLDR Newsletter, The Hustle
Education: How-to outbound, SDR tips, cold email teardowns
Social Proof: Customer wins, before/after reply rates, case studies
Transparency: Build-in-public metrics (MRR, churn, feature releases)
Thought Leadership: AI+Sales future, Managed AI SaaS economics, GTM strategy
LinkedIn: 3 posts/week. Target: 10,000 followers by Month 12.
YouTube: 2 videos/week. Target: 1,000 subscribers by Month 6.
Email Newsletter: Weekly Flowfiy Insights for nurture sequence.
SEO Blog: 4 articles/month. Keywords: clay alternative, ai cold email, Managed AI sales automation.
Free: $0 -- 50 lifetime generations, 1 seat. PLG hook.
Break-even: 15 Starter subscribers covers all infra. ~70-80% gross margin from day one.
Assumptions: 3% monthly churn, 40% free-to-paid conversion within 90 days, organic growth Months 1-4, paid acquisition from Month 5.
Gross Margin: ~72% (Managed AI eliminates Claude cost; ~$0.002 infra per generation)
Q1: 25+ paid subscribers, $2,200+ MRR, <5% monthly churn
Q4: 450+ paid subscribers, $33,000+ MRR, $400K ARR run-rate
Total 12-month marketing spend: ~$28,000. Organic channels dominate Months 1-6; paid spend activates after PMF confirmation (NPS > 40, <5% churn).
Anthropic API pricing changes: Add OpenAI/Gemini support as fallback in V2.
Clay adds Managed AI: Compete on price ($49 vs $149 floor) and ease of onboarding.
Low free-to-paid conversion: In-app upgrade prompts at 80% usage + email nurture.
Gmail deliverability issues: Built-in warm-up guidance + Instantly integration.
Churn > 5%/month: Onboarding automation + first 10 leads in 10 minutes benchmark.
Ready to Disrupt the $4.8B Outbound Sales Market
